name: tokentopper
description: See where you rank among AI power users. tokentopper reads your local coding-agent usage (Claude Code + Codex), scores a Fancy AI Usage Index, places you on the 8-tier tokenmaxxing ladder (Curious to Legend), and exports a tamper-evident, ed25519-signed signed.json to claim a verified, shareable rank at openfactoryai.com/tools/tokentopper. Private by default; only token counts, models, and dates leave your machine, never your prompts or code.
author: Kalmantic
